es.title: Cómo funciona el cuerpo: Videos
es.description: Saluda a Chloe y Nurb y deja que te lleven a un viaje por el cuerpo humano en estos videos.

en.title: How the Body Works: Movies
en.description: Say hello to Chloe and Nurb and let them take you on a tour of the human body. You'll find out how the body's organs work and learn about body systems like the digestive system and brain and nervous system. Enjoy your tour!
